content.text:
[cron:water-reminder 喝水提醒] 提醒用户喝水，不要喝饮料，用有趣的方式催他。每次换个花样说。
Current time: Friday, March 20th, 2026 — 17:30 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-20 09:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

**Cron Job Summary:**

- **Name:** water-reminder
- **Description:** 提醒用户喝水，不要喝饮料，用有趣的方式催他。每次换个花样说。
- **Next Run Time:** Friday, March 20th, 2026 — 17:30 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-20 09:30 UTC
- **Action:** The system will automatically send a reminder message to the user in a creative and engaging manner, encouraging them to drink water instead of sugary drinks.

**Note:** This reminder is set to recur. Ensure the message varies each time to maintain user engagement.
